meta.description: Sales page design system — specific to accelera.top/services (Arabic RTL React page). Updated after CRO audit.
audit_findings_summary: CRITICAL: No testimonials or result screenshots section
CRITICAL: Hero lacks social proof above the fold
HIGH: Comparison table buried too low on page
HIGH: Offer section missing price anchoring (no strikethrough original price)
MEDIUM: Video thumbnail too plain, play button too small
MEDIUM: Stats bar too small and placed below video
MEDIUM: Final CTA section lacks contrast and urgency
MEDIUM: No mobile sticky CTA bar

page_audit_status.1_hero: EXISTS — needs: social proof badge above fold, colored keyword spans in headline, fade-in animation
page_audit_status.2_stats_bar: EXISTS but MISPLACED — move ABOVE video, font-size to clamp(1.8rem,3vw,2.8rem) weight 900, add countUp on scroll
page_audit_status.3_video_hook: EXISTS — needs: text overlay on thumbnail, play button 64px red with pulse animation, box-shadow on container
page_audit_status.4_problem_agitation: EXISTS (هذا العرض لكم إذا كنتو) — copy is too generic, needs more emotional specificity
page_audit_status.5_comparison_table: EXISTS but BURIED — move immediately after problem section, add مقارنة حقيقية badge above headline
page_audit_status.11_why_better_than_alternatives: EXISTS (علاش خير من البدائل) — OK as-is
page_audit_status.12_offer_pricing: EXISTS — needs: strikethrough price, savings line, urgency badge, pulse CTA button
page_audit_status.13_faq: EXISTS — expand from 4 to minimum 6 questions
page_audit_status.14_final_cta: EXISTS — needs: dark #0F172A background, white text, guarantee badge, scarcity line, pulse button
page_audit_status.sticky_mobile_cta: MISSING — create StickyMobileCTA.jsx (md:hidden, appears after scroll 400px)

required_elements: Main headline — font-weight 900, clamp(2rem,5vw,3.5rem)
2-3 key words wrapped in <span> with primary color #3B6BF5
Subheadline — font-weight 600, muted color
Social proof badge — pill shape, checkmark icon, text like '+600 وكالة ومستقل طبّقوا النظام'
Primary CTA button — blue, full-width on mobile
Fade-in-up animation on headline (0.6s) and subheadline (delay 0.15s)
4 stat numbers, each clamp(1.8rem,3vw,2.8rem) font-weight 900
CountUp animation triggered by IntersectionObserver
Light blue background strip #F0F4FF
Vertical dividers between stats
Small label under each number in muted color
Video thumbnail with dark gradient overlay at bottom
Bold white text overlay: 'شاهد كيف يشتغل النظام'
Play button: 64x64px, background #E53E3E, white triangle, pulse animation
Container box-shadow: 0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.2)
Container border-radius: 12px
Urgency badge above card: 'العرض ينتهي قريباً 🔥', bg #E53E3E, white text
Original price with line-through: '5,000 DA', color #94A3B8
Real price large: '800 DA', color #3B6BF5, font-weight 900, font-size 2rem
Savings line: 'وفّرت 4,200 DA', color #22C55E
CTA button: full-width, padding 16px, pulse animation
Background: #0F172A (dark navy)
All text: white
Headline: clamp(1.6rem,3vw,2.4rem) font-weight 900
Price display: same as offer section (strikethrough + real + savings)
CTA button: min-width 320px desktop, full-width mobile, padding 18px 48px, pulse animation
Guarantee line: '🛡️ ضمان استرجاع كامل خلال 7 أيام', small muted text
Scarcity line: '⚠️ الأماكن محدودة — لا تفوّت الفرصة', color #F59E0B

InstructorSection.layout: image right, text left (RTL = image on left visually)
InstructorSection.placeholder_note: TODO: Replace with real instructor photo, real achievements, and real stats

card_elements: Result badge: green pill, e.g. '+3 عملاء في أسبوع'
TestimonialsSection.placeholder_note: TODO: Replace with real video testimonials — ideally 6-10 video cards

ResultsSection.card_style: border 1px #E2E8F0, border-radius 8px, box-shadow, slight random rotation for authenticity
ResultsSection.placeholder_note: TODO: Replace with real income/result screenshots from clients

StickyMobileCTA.visibility: md:hidden (Tailwind — hidden on tablet and above)
StickyMobileCTA.style: white background, border-top 1px #E2E8F0, box-shadow upward, padding 12px 16px

FloatingWhatsApp.style: circle w-14 h-14, background #25D366, white WhatsApp SVG icon, box-shadow
FloatingWhatsApp.placeholder_note: TODO: Replace YOUR_NUMBER with real WhatsApp number including country code

cta_button.pulse_animation: scale 1 to 1.03 to 1, every 3s, on final CTA only

fade_in_up.usage: hero headline and subheadline on page load

count_up.trigger: IntersectionObserver — fires when stats bar enters viewport
count_up.method: requestAnimationFrame loop from 0 to final value

pulse_cta.usage: final CTA button and offer card CTA only — NOT every button

mobile_rules.sticky_bar: StickyMobileCTA appears after 400px scroll, hidden on desktop
mobile_rules.font_scale: hero headline reduces by ~30% on mobile via clamp()

conversion_rules.price_display_rule: ALWAYS show strikethrough original price before real price. Never show discount % alone.
conversion_rules.social_proof_rule: Distribute trust signals throughout page — hero badge, stats bar, testimonials mid-page, guarantee at bottom
conversion_rules.urgency_rule: Include at least 1 urgency/scarcity element near each CTA
conversion_rules.specificity_rule: Use exact numbers everywhere: '+600 عميل' not 'مئات العملاء'
conversion_rules.rtl_rule: All new elements must have dir=rtl and text-right as default
conversion_rules.whatsapp_rule: Floating WhatsApp button is mandatory for Arabic market pages
